description_long: This banner features a rectangular, elongated form with a wood-textured background and colorful cartoon characters, including a prominent figure resembling Bart Simpson, printed on its surface. The wood grain pattern gives the banner a rustic, urban feel, while the cartoon graphics add a playful and eye-catching element. The banner appears to be made from a lightweight, rigid material, likely a printed composite or laminated board, suitable for temporary or semi-permanent display. The surface is flat and hard, with the graphics clearly visible across the main face and partially wrapping around the sides. There are no visible mounting fixtures or support structures, suggesting it is designed to be freestanding or propped against a surface. The overall design is intended to attract attention in a public or communal urban setting.
description: A long, rectangular banner with a wood-textured background and colorful cartoon characters, including Bart Simpson, printed on its hard surface. The banner is visually striking and designed for urban display.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full length of the banner with Bart Simpson prominently displayed on the right side against a wood-textured background.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thin profile of the banner and shows the cartoon graphics wrapping slightly onto the edge.
description_view_2: The top view displays the full surface area, highlighting multiple cartoon characters and the continuous wood texture.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the thinness and partial wrap of the graphics.
